title: Viscopy Limited & Copyright Agency Limited - Authorisations - A91285 & A91286
text: The Applicants have entered into a Service Agreement under which Copyright Agency will provide various services to Viscopy including the management and administration of day-to-day ooperations, and seek authorisation to: jointly discuss and negotiate common terms and conditions including fees and scope of services, make and give effect to contracts arrangements and understandings between the applicants, and continue to give effect jointly to the provisions of such agreements.
